name: Don't Disturb My Study
overview: Nan Xiangwan, a successful HR manager, struggles with anxiety. Through psychiatric treatment, she revisits her high school years, where she faced personal and academic challenges. Along the way, she forms a meaningful friendship with Lin Xiaoran, a sports student, and begins to learn valuable lessons about success and self-worth.

trailers.title: 《别想打扰我学习》赖冠霖李兰迪一起进步携手成长 Don't Disturb My Study 【芒果TV青春剧场】
